segments.text: Flicks it away—that was close! Wasn't quite on the ledge though.
segments.original_text: はじいて、あぶな、ギリギリしてなかったよね

segments.text: Try something different, get some space!
segments.original_text: ウィリーでどっかやれ、どっか行けよ

full_text: Flicks it away—that was close! Wasn't quite on the ledge though. Try something different, get some space! Going with bair?
